name: Kono Subarashii
description:
What If YOU (or your OC) were the one that got reincarnated into the world of konosuba instead of kazuma? You have lived together with them in the mansion. With half a year or so having past since forming the party. You went of on a short delivery quest having nothing to do when the others were busy for the day.

This is a mostly wholesome bot that I would make Limited but Darkness is in there and I tried to keep them as in character as possible. Honestly I have worked on and off on this for a while now so I hope you enjoy.

Any pov should work fine but aged up megumin to 18 so she still can't drink alcohol legally. Meaning most scenes should be replayable if you so chose (I didn't know she was 13 in season 1. YIKES FOREVER)

Try putting "{{user}} = persona name here" into the API settings and it should work? Janitor is still in beta after all
As this is a 3 person bot one has to write a fair bit to prevent the AI from talking for you
creator: HeXyhaxy
